title: Storm Chasers Saga 2
description: Survive a weather-driven Minecraft world where storms actively change how you explore, build, and fight. Storm Chasers Saga 2 is a 1.21.1 NeoForge pack focused on dangerous weather, multiplayer survival, and tech-assisted adaptation.
body:
**Storm Chasers Saga 2** is a 1.21.1 NeoForge modpack where weather actually matters. Built around ProtoManly’s Weather mod, this pack turns storms from background scenery into part of the survival experience.

Bad weather makes travel riskier, the world feel harsher, and every trip away from base more tense. With a mix of adventure, combat, and tech, this pack is built for players who want Minecraft to feel more alive, more dangerous, and a lot less predictable.

Perfect for solo survival or multiplayer chaos.

**The Modpack is also available for preinstall at BisectHosting!**
